description:
Your Personal Assistant for Every Special Occasion.

Your Personal Assistant for Every Special Occasion.

Are you tired of scrambling for last-minute gifts or missing important birthdays and anniversaries? Date-a-base is the elegant and intuitive Android app designed to bring peace of mind to your busy life. Keep every special moment alive and celebrated, effortlessly.

✨ Why You'll Love Date-a-base:

  • Effortless Organization: Add birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, and any other important date with just a few taps. Keep everything neatly categorized and at your fingertips.
  • Smart Daily Reminders: Wake up knowing what the day holds! Get a precise notification every morning at 6 AM, summarizing all your upcoming events. Never be caught off guard again.
  • Glanceable Home Screen Widget: Your most important dates, right on your home screen. Our sleek widget updates hourly, showing you what's coming up without even opening the app.
  • Intuitive & Beautiful: Enjoy a modern, user-friendly interface that makes managing your dates a joy, not a chore. Quickly filter by event type or search for specific memories.
  • Your Data, Your Control: Easily export all your precious dates for safekeeping or import them back with a simple CSV file, giving you complete control over your memories.

Date-a-base is more than just a calendar; it's your dedicated partner in celebrating life's precious moments. Built with the latest Android technology, it's reliable, secure, and a delight to use.

Support Independent Development:

If you love Date-a-base and wish to support its continued development, please consider a donation. Your generosity helps keep this app free and open-source!

Buy me a coffee
